title: Ponerorchis taiwanensis
taxonomy: Ponerorchis taiwanensis is a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Ponerorchis, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. The genus Ponerorchis is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae, which is a large and diverse group within the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Further classification includes the family Orchidaceae and the order Asparagales. This classification reflects the evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics of Ponerorchis taiwanensis with other plants within the orchid family.
